name: Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer bowl, combine egg yolks, milk, water, and 3 tablespoons melted butter; beat until well blended.
2. Add flour and salt; beat until smooth.
3. Heat an omelet or crepe pan over medium-high heat until just hot enough to sizzle a drop of water.
4. Brush the pan lightly with melted butter.
5. For each crepe, pour in 1/4 cup batter, tipping and tilting the pan to move the batter quickly over the bottom.
6. Cook until lightly browned on the bottom and dry on top.
7. Remove the crepe from the pan, or if desired, turn it over and brown the other side.
8. Brush the pan lightly with melted butter as needed to prevent sticking.
9. Stack crepes between layers of wax paper until ready to fill.
